title: Basket Random
description: A fun, chaotic 2-player basketball game with random physics. Score baskets by jumping and swinging your arms!

title: Bloxd.io
description: A Minecraft-inspired multiplayer game with various modes like survival, creative, and parkour. Build, explore, and compete with others in a blocky world.

title: Cookie Clicker
description: The legendary idle game that started a phenomenon. Bake as many cookies as humanly possible! Hire grandmas, build factories, and reach universal domination.

title: Quick-Draw
description: The ultimate wild west reaction test. Progress through levels, buy upgrades, and survive the bandit onslaught in this upgraded arcade classic!

title: Retro Bowl
description: The classic 8-bit style American football game. Manage your team, call the plays, and lead your franchise to glory.

title: Pokemon Leaf Green
description: Relive the classic GBA adventure! Capture, train, and battle Pokemon in the Kanto region in this enhanced remake.

title: Snow Rider 3D
description: Experience the pure thrill of a high-speed sled ride down a treacherous mountain! Dodge obstacles and collect gifts in this exhilarating 3D winter adventure.

title: Football Bros
description: A fast-paced, action-packed American football game. Dash, pass, and score touchdowns in this exciting sports arcade experience!
